SomeBodyToTalkTo
Register Now Amyloidosis Program Spotlight Series · May 2026
Spotlight Session
90-Minute Extended Session: TTR Inheritance,
Genetic Testing & ACT-EARLY Trial
Rachel Campagna,
MS CGC
Genetic Counsellor
University of Chicago
Wednesday, May 27, 2026 · 5:00 PM CT

This 90-minute extended session will help patients and families better understand how TTR gene mutations are inherited, what genetic counselors do, and how genetic testing works. The program will also include an overview of the ACT-EARLY clinical trial and the importance of identifying hereditary ATTR amyloidosis as early as possible.

Scan the QR code or register below:
somebodytotalkto.com/register
scan to
register
* This session is free and open to patients, caregivers, and healthcare professionals. Registration required.
